suite_name: Login functionlity and log out verify

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the home/dashboard page with a valid session established
steps: Verify the login page is displayed with username and password fields
Enter the valid password in the password field
Verify the user is redirected to the home/dashboard page
Verify the authenticated user's name or email is visible in the UI
and print the user name (e.g., in a header or profile menu)
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with valid credentials
